description: OpenClaw tool/skill references to OWeb Composio patterns

openclawRequiresToIntegrationHint.channels.slack: Connect Slack in Integrations, then enable Slack on Channels.
openclawRequiresToIntegrationHint.channels.telegram: Connect Telegram bot token in Channels, then enable the Telegram channel webhook.
openclawRequiresToIntegrationHint.channels.whatsapp: Connect Twilio or WhatsApp via Integrations.
openclawRequiresToIntegrationHint.channels.msteams: Connect Microsoft Teams + configure Azure Bot (see docs/channels/TEAMS_SETUP.md).
openclawRequiresToIntegrationHint.channels.imessage: iMessage is not supported on OWeb.
openclawRequiresToIntegrationHint.channels.signal: Signal is not supported on OWeb.
openclawRequiresToIntegrationHint.browser: Browser automation uses browser_tool + Anchor Browser. Ensure ANCHOR_API_KEY or connect browser_tool.
openclawRequiresToIntegrationHint.webSearch.brave: Use composio_search or connect Tavily/Perplexity in Integrations.
openclawRequiresToIntegrationHint.webSearch.tavily: Tavily is available via composio_search without OAuth, or connect the tavily toolkit.
openclawRequiresToIntegrationHint.memory: OWeb uses org memory graph (ao_entities) — no OpenClaw memory plugin required.

toolActionRewrites.replace: OWeb browser_tool (see browse_web and browser_tool Composio tools)
